## Learning programs

Discover grouped courses designed to build essential skills.

[![learning-program-img](https://cdn-share.almentor.net/images/bundle-1767181938997.jpg)\\
\\
BBC Dars\\
\\
This program is a free educational initiative offered in partnership with the BBC, aimed at helping children learn core skills in English, mathematics, science, and mental health in a fun, simple way.\\
The program includes five interconnected learning tracks that begin with beginner English and progress to more advanced language skills, while also strengthening math through addition, subtraction, fractions, and mental multiplication.\\
It also covers engaging science topics such as space and electricity, and focuses on a very important aspect of children’s lives—mental health—helping them understand their emotions, cope with stress, displacement, and loss, and build hope.\\
The content is carefully designed for young learners and relies on trusted educational videos from the BBC, making learning more interactive and enriching.\\
\\
5 Courses \\
\\
3h 47mins \\
\\
Show Program](https://www.almentor.net/en/bundles/bbc)

[![learning-program-img](https://cdn-share.almentor.net/images/bundle-1738062958448.jpg)\\
\\
Business English\\
\\
The "Business English" bundle is a collection of courses designed to develop your English skills (intermediate level) for effective use in various professional environments. These courses will help you improve your communication and interaction in English within the workplace.\\
\\
You will enhance your conversation skills in professional settings, learn how to successfully handle job interviews in English, confidently talk about yourself, and express your ideas with professionalism. You'll also discover how to avoid common mistakes that could impact your opportunities.\\
\\
Moreover, you will learn how to write clear and professional emails in English, using correct grammar and tenses, while improving your written communication style. We will focus on crafting effective emails for workplace scenarios, such as organizing meetings, delegating tasks, handling delays, or making apologies.\\
\\
Additionally, one of the courses in this package will teach you how to deliver impactful presentations by utilizing storytelling techniques and organizing your ideas in an engaging and easy-to-follow manner. You’ll gain public speaking and communication skills to help you build a strong presence and confidently advance your career.\\
\\
By taking these courses, you'll strengthen your business English skills and expand your professional opportunities.\\
\\
5 Courses \\
\\
15h 11mins \\
\\
Show Program](https://www.almentor.net/en/bundles/business-english)

[![learning-program-img](https://cdn-share.almentor.net/images/bundle-1738146330970.jpg)\\
\\
Advanced English Mastery\\
\\
The "Advanced English Mastery" bundle includes a set of courses that will help you reach fluency and confidence in English, write professional English articles and reports, and interact with English speakers and understand them easily by developing your listening skills.\\
\\
Through the "The Fluency Formula" course, you will learn effective strategies for speaking fluently, ways to improve pronunciation, overcome grammatical errors, and how to memorize and remember English words and terms easily. One of the bundle's courses also focuses on using tenses in English correctly in addition to explaining important rules such as the conditional If rule and the use of indirect speech.\\
\\
On the other hand, if you are preparing for the IELTS exam, the "IELTS Exam Preparation" course is your first step to reaching the score you need to achieve your goal, whether it is immigration, work, or study. You will learn the required listening and reading skills, how to answer questions, and how to deal with the speaking test with confidence. You will master writing articles according to the test standards to achieve the highest scores. You will also develop the professional writing skills necessary in the work environment. You will learn how to write business reports, improve the flow of texts, and correct common grammar and punctuation errors, ensuring your ideas are clear. Subscribe now and start your English development journey.\\
\\
4 Courses \\
\\
15h 18mins \\
\\
Show Program](https://www.almentor.net/en/bundles/advanced-english-mastery)

[![learning-program-img](https://cdn-share.almentor.net/images/bundle-1744038289037.jpg)\\
\\
Freelancing Explorer\\
\\
The "Freelancing Explorer" program will help you enter the world of freelancing with confidence and readiness. It provides a solid foundation for anyone who wants to start their career online, even without previous experience.\\
\\
Through four comprehensive courses, you will learn about the concept of freelancing, its advantages, the challenges you might face, and how to overcome them. You will discover how to build a personal brand that sets you apart, and how to create a professional portfolio that attracts clients and clearly showcases your skills. You will also gain essential skills in pricing, negotiation, proposal writing, and managing contracts with professionalism and smart strategies.\\
\\
The program offers a step-by-step guide on how to work on freelancing platforms such as Mostaql and Upwork, giving you the tools needed to market your services, build strong professional relationships, and deal with clients confidently.\\
\\
Whether you're a student, a recent graduate, or someone considering a career shift, this program is designed to be your practical guide to confidently start your journey in this wide and promising field. Our goal is to help you become prepared, independent, and outstanding on your path toward financial and professional freedom.\\
\\
3 Courses \\
\\
8h \\
\\
Show Program](https://www.almentor.net/en/bundles/freelancing-explorer)

[![learning-program-img](https://cdn-share.almentor.net/images/bundle-1747924652704.jpg)\\
\\
Must-Have AI Skills\\
\\
In this program, we will take you on an educational journey to explore the fundamentals of artificial intelligence (AI), its modern technologies, and practical applications, equipping you with the necessary skills to interact with and benefit from AI in both your personal and professional life.\\
The program begins with an introduction to AI and its various types, with a special focus on generative models, which enable the production of high-quality text, images, and videos. Additionally, you will gain an understanding of artificial neural networks, which serve as the foundation for systems such as speech and image recognition.\\
\\
Next, you will dive into prompt engineering, a key skill for improving your interaction with AI models like ChatGPT. You will learn how to craft intelligent and precise prompts to ensure optimal responses. We will also explore advanced programming frameworks such as APE, RACE, COAST, and RISE, which are used to develop and enhance the ability of AI systems to comprehend and interact effectively.\\
\\
You will also discover the importance of the English language in AI, as most data and advanced models rely on English-based content. We will help you develop your skills in giving precise prompts in English to achieve the best results.\\
\\
Finally, you will gain knowledge and skills in using the Gemini tool and learn how to integrate various AI tools into Microsoft Office applications to complete tasks more quickly and accurately.\\
\\
This program is designed to take you from a beginner to an advanced level, equipping you with the necessary tools to understand AI and utilize it effectively in your daily life and across various professional fields.\\
\\
5 Courses \\
\\
8h 20mins \\
\\
Show Program](https://www.almentor.net/en/bundles/must-have-ai-skills)

[![learning-program-img](https://cdn-share.almentor.net/images/bundle-1744036940239.jpg)\\
\\
Cybersecurity Specialist\\
\\
The "Cybersecurity Specialist" program is designed to equip you with the knowledge and skills you need to advance in this field and to protect yourself and those around you from growing digital threats.\\
\\
The program consists of five courses that cover both the foundational and advanced aspects of cybersecurity. The first course introduces the concept of cybersecurity, the importance of using systems like Kali Linux, and explores common types of cyberattacks and how to defend against them.\\
\\
You’ll then move on to learn the basics of networking and digital infrastructure, gaining a clear understanding of how security teams operate within organizations. After that, you’ll explore how to protect your personal and family privacy from everyday online threats, including topics like securing financial information and monitoring children's internet usage.\\
\\
The fourth course focuses on managing cybersecurity within organizations, including implementing security policies, setting up VPN networks, and assessing various types of risks. Finally, the fifth course dives into cybercrime analysis, threat detection, and how to handle phishing attacks and malware in a professional way.\\
\\
Join the program and start your journey into cybersecurity and the digital world with confidence.\\
\\
5 Courses \\
\\
17h 59mins \\
\\
Show Program](https://www.almentor.net/en/bundles/cybersecurity-specialist)

Show All Programs

## Empowering organizations through scalable learning solutions

Customized Learning at Scale

Deliver enterprise learning platforms tailored to your organization’s learning needs.

Strategic Alignment

Support national agendas and development goals through targeted, results-driven learning programs.

Social & Youth Empowerment

Equip young people and communities with skills that fuel social development and long-term change.

Government & NGO-Ready

Designed for impact across sectors — whether you’re a ministry, NGO, or global corporation.

End-to-End Solutions

We manage the entire learning journey — from design to delivery — to ensure effective results.

Measurable Impact

Track learner progress and assess program outcomes with robust analytics and reporting tools.

# Download and learn on the go!

![Watch offline](https://www.almentor.net/assets/images/icons/import-outline.svg)Download courses, and learn anywhere, anytime.

![Bite-sized learning](https://www.almentor.net/assets/images/icons/video-square-outline.svg)Enjoy bite-sized learning content using our clips feature.

![Listen to courses](https://www.almentor.net/assets/images/icons/volume-high-outline.svg)Love multi-tasking? Lock your screen and enjoy listening to the courses.

[![Download on the App Store](https://www.almentor.net/assets/images/play-store-button.svg)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.almentor.app)[![Get it on Google Play](https://www.almentor.net/assets/images/app-store-button.svg)](https://apps.apple.com/eg/app/almentor/id1645104637)

![Mobile app interface](https://www.almentor.net/assets/images/mobile-app-preview-en.png)

### Start your learning journey today!

Unlimited access to more than 1,000 video courses in Arabic, starting from  11 USD

Subscribe now

__llm_logo_reasoning.reasoning: Selected #0 because it is visible, located in the header, links to the homepage, and matches the brand name 'almentor'.

primary.reasoning: Button #1 has a vibrant red/orange background (#EB2027), which is a strong brand color and stands out as the primary call-to-action with the text 'Subscribe Now'.

secondary.reasoning: Button #3 has a dark background (#000000) and provides a secondary action 'Get started now', which complements the primary action without using the same color group.

rawLogoSelection.selectedLogoReasoning: Selected #0 because it is visible, located in the header, links to the homepage, and matches the brand name 'almentor'.
